creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yasir wrote:
>> Fix:
> There should have been used printf(1) instead.
> Man should be corrected, namely, sed 's/echo -n/printf/'


printf should always work, yes. In our sh and in bash, 'echo -e' will
also work.


hth,

Doug
